objectives: Build a domain-agnostic recursive strategic reasoning platform that transforms goals into approved execution-ready specifications
Validate whether users will pay for structured multi-perspective AI reasoning as a standalone product
Canonize the 5-perspective pattern as Cortex 02.10 before any external productization
Establish knowledge libraries as the defensible moat (proprietary content, not just the reasoning engine)
Determine whether RCM Platform is an internal tool, a public SaaS, or both — and under what governance

concepts.name: RCM Core SaaS — Strategic Reasoning Workspace
RCM for Therapy, Coaching & Personal Development
RCM for Scientific Research & Grant Writing
RCM Export Integration Hub & API Gateway
RCM for M&A Due Diligence & Investment Committees
RCM Game Engine for Interactive Narrative Design
RCM Legal Reasoning & Case Strategy Platform
RCM as Open Protocol / Standard Body
RCM MCP Server for Claude & AI Assistant Ecosystem

research.question: How does Sakana Marlin's AB-MCTS compare structurally to RCM's 5-perspective loop?
What is the adoption rate of multi-agent orchestration platforms in Fortune 500?
What gaps exist between design thinking (Miro/MURAL) and project management (Jira/Linear)?
What is pricing elasticity for AI-augmented strategic planning across verticals?
Has any product successfully commoditized 'exposed reasoning' as a consumer social feature?
What regulatory requirements exist for AI-augmented decision platforms in gov/legal/healthcare?
How do the 5 perspectives map to established cognitive models (Kahneman, Jungian, etc.)?
TAM for strategic reasoning tools by vertical — what share for domain-agnostic vs vertical-specific?

evidence.source: Competitor analysis — pingpongit ($24.99-59.99/mo), Suprmind ($19-95/mo), HATS (open source), ChatGPT Deep Research

evidence.claim: B₁ skill is already built and validated
evidence.source: Skill exists at .claude/skills/optimo-rcm/ with all 5 perspective prompts and Project State schema
Library registry shows all 8 libraries as 'not yet created'
Ideation filed in Slack #ideation-triage — no external user research conducted

evidence.claim: 5+ funded competitors exist in this space
evidence.source: Web research — pingpongit, Suprmind, HATS, NEXUS, ChatGPT Deep Research, Taskade Genesis

assumptions.assumption: Users will pay for a structured reasoning tool that produces spec documents but not working software
assumptions.ifFalse: No revenue model — becomes free tool with no monetization path
assumptions.validation: Concierge test with 5 external design partners

assumptions.assumption: 5-perspective reasoning produces tangibly better outcomes than a single well-prompted Claude session
assumptions.ifFalse: Core value prop collapses — 5x inference cost unjustifiable

assumptions.assumption: Knowledge libraries are a defensible moat that cannot be replicated by competitors
assumptions.ifFalse: Platform has no advantage — competitors clone within months
assumptions.validation: Audit each library for proprietary vs. public knowledge ratio

assumptions.assumption: Joel Embry (CEO) actively sponsors this beyond initial architectural review
assumptions.ifFalse: Initiative stalls at first resource conflict — becomes zombie project
assumptions.validation: Direct 1:1 with Joel to get explicit priority statement

assumptions.assumption: B₁ skill architecture maps correctly onto Claude Code agent system
assumptions.ifFalse: Architecture needs redesign — agents talk past each other
assumptions.validation: Dogfood session with real non-trivial problem (Condition C5)

decisions.decision: Decompose RCM Platform into A (Canonical Core) + B₁ (Claude Code Skill) + B₂ (Web App — deferred)
decisions.rationale: Evaluator: A scores 4.15/5, B₁ scores 3.90/5, B₂ scores 2.80/5. Proceed with A+B₁ now; B₂ conditional.

decisions.decision: Skill-first approach validated — B₁ already built at near-zero infra cost
decisions.rationale: Executor confirms B₁ is functional with all 5 perspective prompts and Project State schema

decisions.decision: B₂ (Web App) remains CONDITIONAL-GO pending: user demand validation, dogfood success, differentiation strategy
decisions.rationale: Evaluator + Threat concur: crowded market (5+ competitors), no content moat, unclear unit economics

deliverables.name: Knowledge Libraries (8 total)
deliverables.spec: Human Truths, Audience Intelligence, Objections, Visual Cognition, Media Hierarchy, Media Composition, UI/UX, Marketing View

deliverables.name: Domain Packs (5 total)
deliverables.spec: Marketing, Product, UI/UX, Media, Venture, Research

dependencies.name: Knowledge library content creation
dependencies.resolution: Sam + content council authors content in Confluence

dependencies.name: B₁ dogfood validation (Condition C5)
dependencies.resolution: Run 2+ real use cases with measurable outcomes

dependencies.name: Susan/Sam boundary agreement
dependencies.resolution: Written agreement: RCM Platform scope vs OptimoCanon scope

risks.description: RCM Platform exposes Optimo's proprietary 5-perspective reasoning pattern to competitors via public SaaS
risks.mitigation: Keep B₁ workspace-only. Never open-source the engine. B₂ if built must be single-tenant enterprise with contractual IP protection.

risks.description: Platform occupies no-man's-land between product and feature — 'empty room' problem
risks.mitigation: Validate WTP before building B₂. Concierge MVP with paying prospects. Only proceed if 3+ LOIs.

risks.description: Inference costs at scale destroy unit economics — $13K/month at 500 projects
risks.mitigation: Model costs at multiple tiers before pricing. Usage-based pricing, not flat-rate. Aggressive prompt caching.

risks.description: Anthropic ships native multi-perspective reasoning as a built-in feature
risks.mitigation: Monitor Anthropic roadmap. Pivot to knowledge-library-as-a-service if this ships.

risks.description: Sam is sole knowledge content creator — single point of failure
risks.mitigation: Content council with minimum 2 contributors per domain pack. Define Sam-unavailability plan.

constraints.description: Proprietary knowledge libraries CANNOT be distributed in public SaaS or open-source repo
02.10 pattern is canonicalized — cannot be weakened or modified for commercial purposes
B₁ is Claude Code skill — cannot run outside Claude Code environment
B₂ cannot be built until Condition C5 met (B₁ validated with real use case)
5 funded ventures in active development — RCM Platform competes for same talent pool

successCriteria.threshold: >=5/15 recruited externals commit to paid pilot within 2 weeks
successCriteria.rationale: Strongest signal of PMF for thinking tool

successCriteria.threshold: >=3 venture leads use RCM for 1+ real decision within 30 days
successCriteria.rationale: Proves tooling layer adds value over raw pattern

successCriteria.threshold: Written agreement filed in Confluence before any code written
New users reach non-obvious insight within 3 sessions / 60 minutes
successCriteria.rationale: North Star UX metric — high-friction tool dies without fast value

successCriteria.threshold: Pass Gate 1 (business case) within 6 weeks or initiative killed

feedback.conditionsForSupport: Evidence RCM does NOT expose 02.10 internals; ventures get preferential access; self-funding from launch; Sam commits to 12-month P&L
Clear demarcation: RCM Platform is product realization of subset of canon; OptimoCanon remains authoritative methodology; joint naming board
Dedicated (not borrowed) resources; external funding or committed budget; 90-day kill switch
Standard venture intake process followed; stage-gate 0 complete; stage-gate 1 required before build
RCM positioned as complementary infrastructure (internal tool); ventures get free/priority access
Compelling free tier; non-obvious insight within 3 uses; integration with existing tools; <$30/mo
White-label/API access; consultant certification; limited direct-to-client features

phases.name: Phase 3 — Single-User Web App
deliverables: Lovable project with Supabase data model
